calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.

Dept. 514, Judge: Kay Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Self-represented Petitioner Caesar Castro LaFuente sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Serge Caesar LaFuente.
Decree Changing Name was submitted and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Reset To Sep-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
